response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, and cloud infrastructure, directly aligning with the required stack and responsibilities; he has explicit experience with AI-agent infrastructure, testing frameworks, and scalable systems, plus strong communication skills demonstrated through workshops and open-source leadership.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven AI-agent and tooling development experience
Strong open-source contributions and communication/teaching skills
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
German language proficiency is only basic in a Berlin-based role
Diverse background may raise questions about focus on enterprise automation tooling

key_factors.factor: Missing explicit tooling in job stack (Nest.js/Vitest)
